ation":1846,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18174,"reply_count":12,"show_pv":69093},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7487767244335153944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"终于看完，非常棒的书，我觉得分数还可以再高一些的9.5我觉得比较合适，整个故事线非常清晰，文笔也流畅，几乎没有什么错字或者错文，故事的逻辑也很合理，过去看了不少爽文到最后几章节，都总是会想要快点看完换下一本，但是唯独这一部是我希望不要那么快完结的，即便到了快结束的章节，也是不会着急地去追逐结局。整一部看下来都是很舒服，虽然主角也有吃瘪的时候，但是不会看着太揪心，或许就是根据故事的逻辑，对于主角光环的信任吧。大结局非常不错，不是那种无敌撒花，而是有着一些哲学意味的合理。最后，还是那一句，爽文的典范啊，确实是好书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743390594,"group_id":"7092830808066493470","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看什么看！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8JiTIF89NV0oUb3aA8eO1E=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dd981958dea64c52ae6655e99d81ad6d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776704170\u0026x-signature=PNonJiRZd%2BoJAV7NVB5zs%2BR%2FSww%3D","user_id":"4930477868","user_name":"羊驼的天职"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4930477868","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"svip\",\"title_id\":\"svip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7092830808066493470","book_info":{"abstract":"一朝被绿，景星辰在狂风中迎来了颠覆人生的全能系统！八大功能支持，让景星辰在这世界立足脚跟！步步登向世界首富！神级祝福？我有！定点签到？我有！完美抽奖？我有！超强科技？那更是必须有！暴富预测？小意思！无敌置换？哇塞了！恶毒
